channel.title: Posts on The Tadpole's Swamp
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on The Tadpole's Swamp

item.title: 'Reviving' an old Macbook with Arch Linux
item.description: This entire debacle began when I recieved an almost decade old Macbook Pro. To be precise, one from Mid 2014 with a 4th gen i5 processor, 8 GB DDR3 RAM, and a 128 GB SSD.
